meta.name: Auvvo AI SaaS Design System
meta.style: Dark Futuristic Glassmorphism with Pastel Glowing Accents
meta.personality: Cutting-edge, intelligent, ethereal, tech-forward but accessible
meta.aesthetic_direction: Inspired by Nexus Engineering's dark, complex workflow UIs, mixed with the soft, ethereal pastel gradients of the Auvvo brand. Surfaces are dark frosted glass floating over subtle blurred background meshes (Orchid Haze, Azure Mist). High contrast tech typography.

background.note: Deep black page background. The 'magic' comes from large, highly blurred circles (filter: blur(100px)) using the pastel brand colors placed behind the glass cards.

surface.note: Cards are dark and translucent (glassmorphism), allowing the background pastel glows to subtly shine through.

accent.note: Brand colors from the Auvvo guideline: Orchid Haze (Purple), Azure Mist (Blue), Coral Bloom (Coral), Soft Peach (Peach).

text.note: Pure white for primary data/headlines, neutral grays for body to reduce eye strain.

border.note: Borders are barely visible, acting as highlights on the edges of the glass panels.

font_families.note: Space Grotesk substitutes 'Auvvo Sans' for a futuristic, geometric tech feel. Inter is perfectly legible for UI data.

elevation.note: Depth is created by inner top-borders (light catching the glass) and soft outer dark shadows.

sidebar.nav_item: color #A1A1AA, hover color #FFFFFF, hover background rgba(255,255,255,0.05)

card_glass.base: background rgba(15,15,15,0.6), backdrop-filter blur(24px), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08), border-radius 16px

agent_card.layout: Flex column, top icon, title, status badge, action buttons
agent_card.icon_wrapper: background linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(216,180,226,0.2) 0%, rgba(214,232,245,0.2) 100%), border-radius 12px, padding 12px
agent_card.hover: transform translateY(-4px), border color #D8B4E2, box-shadow glow_hover

wizard_step_indicator.inactive_circle: background transparent, border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2), color #52525B

terminal_block.description: Used to show API keys or System Prompts

layout.app_shell: CSS Grid: 280px sidebar (fixed), 1fr main content area
layout.max_width_content: 1000px in the main area to keep reading lines comfortable
layout.wizard_layout: Narrow centered column (max-width 600px) for step-by-step forms to maintain focus

motion.mesh_breathe: Background pastel meshes slowly pulse in scale and opacity (10s duration)

design_principles: DARK & ETHEREAL: The UI is fundamentally dark mode, but it avoids looking 'hacker-ish' by using soft, highly blurred pastel color meshes in the background to create an ethereal, intelligent glow.
GLASS SURFACES: All cards and panels are translucent black with subtle white borders. They must let the background glows pass through them slightly.
NEON ACCENTS: Use the brand colors (Orchid Haze, Azure Mist) for active states, primary buttons, and glowing hover effects.
TECH TYPOGRAPHY: Use 'Space Grotesk' for all headings to give it an engineering/Nexus feel, while keeping 'Inter' for data readability.
WIZARD FOCUS: When creating an agent, hide the sidebar and center the form. The user should feel like they are interacting with a terminal/AI interface.
